'''{{PAGENAME}}''' is a Gaiad character mentioned in chapter(s) 5 and 12 and 14 and 15 and 16 and 28 and 30 and 32 and 33 and 34 and 35 and 36 and 37 and 39 and 40 and 41 and 44 and 45 and 48 and 49 and 50 and 51 and 53 and 54 and 59 and 60 and 61 and 62 and 329.

[[Category:Generated Gaiad character entries for the 1st 62 chapters]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:Pages]]
